pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh: injects 13 items (7 cases + 3 articles + 3 duplicates), task removes 3 duplicates = 10 remaining
setup_task.sh injects this case; verified against https://www.archives.gov/milestone-documents/brown-v-board-of-education as a real Supreme Court case (1954)

setup_task.sh injects this case; verified against https://www.uscourts.gov/about-federal-courts/educational-resources/educational-activities/fifth-amendment-activities/miranda-v-arizona/facts-and-case-summary-miranda-v-arizona as a real Supreme Court case (1966)

setup_task.sh injects this case; verified against https://www.uscourts.gov/about-federal-courts/educational-resources/educational-activities/sixth-amendment-activities/gideon-v-wainwright/facts-and-case-summary-gideon-v-wainwright as a real Supreme Court case (1963)
setup_task.sh defines field ID 2 as abstractNote in FIELDS dict; good version contains full abstract

setup_task.sh line 81 contains exact phrase: 'overturning Plessy v. Ferguson'; verified against https://www.archives.gov/milestone-documents/brown-v-board-of-education confirming Brown overturned Plessy
setup_task.sh defines field ID 2 as abstractNote; good version contains full abstract

setup_task.sh line 83 contains exact phrase: 'suspects in police custody'; verified against https://www.uscourts.gov/about-federal-courts/educational-resources/educational-activities/fifth-amendment-activities/miranda-v-arizona confirming Miranda established warnings for suspects in police custody
setup_task.sh defines field ID 60 as court; good version contains court field

setup_task.sh line 85 contains 'United States Supreme Court' which includes 'Supreme Court'; verified against https://www.uscourts.gov/about-federal-courts/educational-resources/educational-activities/sixth-amendment-activities/gideon-v-wainwright confirming Gideon is a U.S. Supreme Court case

privileged_info_summary: The task involves merging duplicate Supreme Court cases in Juris-M library. Initial library contains 13 items: 7 authentic Supreme Court cases (Brown v. Board of Education 1954, Marbury v. Madison 1803, Miranda v. Arizona 1966, New York Times Co. v. Sullivan 1964, Gideon v. Wainwright 1963, Obergefell v. Hodges 2015, Tinker v. Des Moines 1969), 3 law review articles, and 3 duplicates of the first three cases with missing metadata. The correct merged state should contain exactly 10 items. Brown v. Board of Education's preserved abstract mentions overturning Plessy v. Ferguson; Miranda v. Arizona's preserved abstract refers to police custody requirements; Gideon v. Wainwright's preserved court field contains 'Supreme Court'.
